---
pagetitle: "demonlab"
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: index.css
editor: source
---

::: {.content-block}

![](images/WebsiteUnderConstruction.png){width=100%}

:::


::: {.content-block}

<div class="hero-section">

<div class="hero-text">

## DeMON Lab

### Mapping the trajectory of neurodegenerative disease

We develop computational approaches integrating neuroimaging and multi-omics data to understand disease progression in Alzheimer’s disease and related dementias.

Our work combines statistical learning, disease progression modelling, neuroimaging, and molecular profiling to identify biologically meaningful disease subtypes and early pathological change.

<div class="hero-buttons">

[Our Research](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

[Publications](papers.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg}

</div>

</div>

<div class="hero-image">

![](images/logo_col_type1.png)

</div>

</div>

:::


::: {.content-block}

---

<div class="home-grid">

<div class="home-about">

## About the Lab

The DeMON Lab at Lund University focuses on computational neuroscience and neurodegenerative disease research.

We use multimodal datasets, including MRI, PET, transcriptomics, and genetics, to model disease progression and better understand the biological mechanisms underlying dementia.

</div>

<div class="home-news">

## Latest News

🚧 Website updates in progress.

News from Linked In will appear here soon, in the meantime:

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/demon-lab/posts/?feedView=all){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

</div>

</div>

:::


::: {.content-block}

---

<div class="logo-row">

[![](images/lundolog.png)](https://lu.se/)

[![](images/scilifelab_logo.png)](https://scilifelab.se/)

</div>

:::
